evals.prompt: Revit modelindeki tüm boruların sistem tipi ve nominal çapına göre metrajını (BOQ) çıkar. Her grup için toplam uzunluğu metre cinsinden göster.
evals.expected_output: A correct C# script body that collects all Pipe elements using Autodesk.Revit.DB.Plumbing.Pipe (fully qualified), reads RBS_SYSTEM_TYPE_PARAM and RBS_PIPE_DIAMETER_PARAM and CURVE_ELEM_LENGTH, converts to meters using UnitTypeId.Meters, groups by system+diameter into a Dictionary, uses string.Format (no interpolation), wraps in try-catch, ends with return.
assertions: Code uses Autodesk.Revit.DB.Plumbing.Pipe as fully qualified type name
Code does NOT contain class or method definitions
Code uses string.Format instead of $"..." string interpolation
FilteredElementCollector includes .WhereElementIsNotElementType()
Unit conversion uses UnitTypeId.Meters (not DisplayUnitType)
RBS_PIPE_DIAMETER_PARAM or RBS_PIPE_OUTER_DIAMETER is used for pipe diameter
CURVE_ELEM_LENGTH is used for pipe length
Code groups results using a Dictionary with fully qualified type System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary
Code is wrapped in try-catch returning HATA/ERROR string on exception
Code ends with a return statement
uiApp and doc are NOT redeclared

evals.prompt: Modeldeki tüm HVAC kanallarını sistem tipine ve boyutuna (dikdörtgen WxH veya yuvarlak Ø) göre gruplandırarak toplam uzunluklarını m cinsinden listele.
evals.expected_output: A correct C# script body that collects Duct elements using Autodesk.Revit.DB.Mechanical.Duct (fully qualified), reads system type, duct width/height (rectangular) and diameter (round) parameters, converts units using UnitTypeId, groups into Dictionary, outputs formatted list using string.Format, wrapped in try-catch.
assertions: Code uses Autodesk.Revit.DB.Mechanical.Duct as fully qualified type name
Code does NOT contain class or method definitions
Code reads RBS_DUCT_WIDTH_PARAM and RBS_DUCT_HEIGHT_PARAM for rectangular ducts
Code reads RBS_DUCT_DIAMETER_PARAM for round ducts
Code uses string.Format instead of string interpolation
FilteredElementCollector includes .WhereElementIsNotElementType()
Unit conversion uses UnitTypeId (not DisplayUnitType)
Code groups results using System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary (fully qualified)
Code is wrapped in try-catch returning error string on exception
Code ends with a return statement

evals.prompt: Her boru sistemindeki toplam basınç kaybını hesapla. Sürtünme kaybı (Pa/m) ile uzunluğu (m) çarparak segment bazlı hesap yap, sistem bazında topla ve sonuçları sırala.
evals.expected_output: A correct C# script body that collects Pipe elements, reads RBS_FRICTION (friction per meter) and CURVE_ELEM_LENGTH, converts using UnitTypeId.PascalsPerMeter and UnitTypeId.Meters, multiplies friction * length per segment, accumulates by system name using Dictionary, outputs sorted results with string.Format, wrapped in try-catch.
assertions: Code uses Autodesk.Revit.DB.Plumbing.Pipe as fully qualified type name
Code reads RBS_FRICTION parameter for friction loss
Code reads CURVE_ELEM_LENGTH for pipe length
Code converts friction using UnitTypeId (not DisplayUnitType)
Code multiplies friction rate by length to get segment pressure loss
Code accumulates pressure loss by system using Dictionary
Code uses string.Format instead of string interpolation
Code is wrapped in try-catch returning error string on exception
Code ends with a return statement
uiApp and doc are NOT redeclared

evals.prompt: Modeldeki tüm sprinkler başlıklarını kata göre say ve toplam adet olarak listele.
evals.expected_output: A correct C# script body that uses FilteredElementCollector with OfCategory(BuiltInCategory.OST_Sprinklers) and OfClass(typeof(FamilyInstance)), reads fi.Level.Name for each sprinkler, counts by level using Dictionary, outputs with string.Format, wrapped in try-catch.
assertions: Code uses OST_Sprinklers as the category filter
Code uses OfClass(typeof(FamilyInstance))
Code does NOT contain class or method definitions
Code reads fi.Level.Name or equivalent for level grouping
Code groups by level using System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary (fully qualified)
Code uses string.Format instead of string interpolation
FilteredElementCollector includes .WhereElementIsNotElementType()
Code is wrapped in try-catch returning error string on exception
Code ends with a return statement
